plugins.cameraPermission: HuntIntel Terrain uses the camera only when you choose to capture a field photo or video.
plugins.photosPermission: HuntIntel Terrain accesses a selected field photo or video only when you choose it.
plugins.microphonePermission: HuntIntel Terrain uses the microphone only when you choose to record field video.
HuntIntel Terrain uses the microphone only when you choose to record a voice note.
